title: spec build skill registry (registry.yaml)
description: Canonical shape of the registry.yaml consumed by spec-cli's default 'registry' SkillRouter. A registry lives at <repo>/.agents/skills/registry.yaml (legacy: <repo>/.spec/agent/skills/registry.yaml). The registry router is a pluggable adapter: a build with router=none ignores this file entirely. Within registry/v1, changes are additive only. Several legacy forms are still accepted for back-compat (noted per field).

skills.description: Routable skills. A node is matched to layer skills by applies_to; modifiers are cross-cutting.

name.description: Skill name; also the directory name under the skills dir when path is omitted.

kind.description: layer skills are matched by applies_to; modifier skills are cross-cutting. Legacy alternative: modifier: true.

modifier.description: Legacy flag equivalent to kind: modifier. A modifier:true entry is auto-composed; a bare kind:modifier entry not listed under top-level modifiers is declared-but-opt-in.

path.description: Skill location, resolved repo-root-relative first (e.g. .agents/skills/<name>), then relative to the registry dir, then as an absolute/~ path. Defaults to name.

applies_to.description: Routing match set. Canonical: a flat list with 'layer:' prefixes for layers and bare strings for repos, e.g. ["my-repo", "layer:rails-api"]. Legacy: a mapping { layers: [...], repos: [...] }.

quality_gates.description: Verification commands a node satisfying this skill must pass. Surfaced via spec_node_context.qualityGates.

modifiers.description: Names (or paths) of cross-cutting skills auto-composed onto the repo's nodes. They compose whether or not a layer skill matches, so a registry that declares only modifiers (no layer skill yet) still routes them. This is the auto-compose selector: a kind:modifier skill not listed here is available but not auto-applied.

conventions.description: Repo-level build conventions spec-cli applies mechanically. Independent of the active skill router (read even under router=none). Additive within registry/v1.

pr_title.description: Template for draft-PR titles. spec-cli substitutes {type} (the conventional-commit type passed to spec_open_pr), {epic} (the spec's epic_key), and {desc} (the spec_open_pr summary, or the node description). Whitespace left by an empty slot is collapsed. Omit to use spec-cli's default title.
